author: The_Hnr
title: Flac support
content: If there was support for editing FLAC files then it would be great.

author: mitskibrainrot
content: When I try to open a file in the app, it doesn’t load or work properly. I’ve tried deleting the app and reinstalling it multiple times but nothing worked, I’m sure it’s a great app but its not working. Please do something about it 🤷‍♀️
